title: Verify Full Cancellation Flow: User rejects all offers and cancels trial
description: Tests that a user can successfully cancel their trial after rejecting the reminder nudge and the discount offer.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the target cohort.
The 'First Month Discount' offer is enabled via the backend.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the 'Trial Corner' hub and click 'Cancel Trial'.
2. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.
3. On the 'Incentive' offer pop-up, click the secondary action to cancel anyway.
4. Verify a feedback pop-up is displayed.
5. Submit feedback or close the pop-up.

expected_result: The user's trial is immediately cancelled. Access to premium content is revoked. The homepage widget updates to the 'cancelled trial' design. The 'feedback-popup-viewed' event is triggered.
